name: advisor-review
description: Run an isolated, read-only Codex CLI reviewer at consequential decision points.

interface.shortDescription: Independent review through an isolated Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: Challenge a plan, diagnose a stalled approach, assess a pivot, or audit completed work through a bounded, read-only Codex CLI review.
defaultPrompt: Run an independent review of my current plan.
Audit this completed work before I declare success.
